news-global-econ.title: WATCH: Sen Warren unloads on Trump’s Fed nominee Kevin Warsh in explosive hearing showdown
news-global-econ.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren calls Fed nominee Kevin Warsh a sock puppet for Trump during a heated Senate confirmation hearing on Capitol Hill this week.

news-global-econ.title: New York City lost residents across all income levels last year, study finds
news-global-econ.description: New York City lost more residents than it gained in 2025, with low- and middle-income New Yorkers leaving at higher rates, a Citizens' Budget Commission study found.

news-global-econ.title: Keith Kellogg urges US to 'finish the job' against Iran by seizing islands, strangling economy
news-global-econ.description: Lt. Gen. Keith Kellogg (Ret.) says the U.S. should "finish the job" against Iran by seizing islands, crippling its economy and ending diplomatic negotiations.

news-global-econ.title: Why the Middle East agrees with President Trump more than America realizes
news-global-econ.description: An immigrant who grew up on the Iranian border explains why millions across the Middle East see the current conflict as long-overdue confrontation.

news-global-econ.title: Trump’s Operation Epic Fury humiliated the experts and redrew the Middle East
news-global-econ.description: Operation Epic Fury reshapes the Middle East as dire predictions about China, Iran's proxies, and soaring energy prices fail to come to pass so far.

news-korea-soc.title: Over 50 House members accuse South Korea's new left-wing government of attacking US companies, favoring China
news-korea-soc.description: More than 50 members of Congress blast South Korea over alleged favoritism toward Chinese businesses and regulatory attacks on American tech companies.

news-global-soc.title: High-alcohol, ready-to-drink cocktails spark overconsumption concerns for Gen Z drinkers
news-global-soc.description: High-alcohol BuzzBallz cocktails are trending among Gen Z drinkers, raising experts' concerns about overconsumption and deceptive sweetness masking potency.

news-global-soc.title: EARTH DAY: Three big signs the climate movement is running out of gas
news-global-soc.description: From Cuba's humanitarian crisis to empty EV plants, rising gas prices and global energy turmoil are reshaping the climate movement's political influence.

news-global-soc.title: Felon Charged for Allegedly Helping Shreveport Gunman Acquire Weapon
news-global-soc.description:
Charles Ford, a 56-year-old felon, was arrested Tuesday for allegedly helping the 31-year-old Shreveport father, who reportedly killed eight children, acquire a firearm.
